symbol_briefs.brief_en: TSM closed at $423.93 up 0.68% with price above all EMAs including EMA200 at $335.33 and golden cross above. Stage2 6/7 with RS 78.1 in confirmed uptrend supports strong setup. Strong AI-driven revenue growth with May revenue up 30% YoY and capacity expansion plans remains the primary catalyst.
